DAVID SHERRIS AND DR. JENS PONIKAU. THE PORTION OF THE MOTION THAT SEEKS TO EXCLUDE EXPERT WITNESSES NOT OFFERED FOR DEPOSITION 72 HOURS PRIOR TO TESTIFYING AT TRIAL IS MOOT. Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Text Ruling

Mtn For Order Setting The Compensation Of Pltf'S Experts & Mtn To Exclude Expert Witnesses Not Offered For Depo 72 Hrs Prior To Testifying At Trial & Req For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Allan Gutche, for Defendant/Moving party
Mark Davis, for Plaintiff/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants Monica Zimmerman, Alan Zimmerman's Motion To Set The Compensation Of Plaintiff's Experts And Motion To Exclude Expert Witnesses Not Offered For Deposition 72 Hours Prior To Testifying At Trial is denied as it seeks to set a different fee than the fees sought by Dr. David Sherris and Dr. Jens Ponikau. The portion of the motion that seeks to exclude expert witnesses not offered for deposition 72 hours prior to testifying at trial is moot. Defendants' request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
